current_wind.description: Strong wind from the NW, gusting very strong

wind_info.description: Strong headwind from slightly left of center

bh.shot_strategy: Headwind requires an overstable disc. Keep the angle clean. Play a hyzer line.

bh.shot_strategy: Wind pushes right, natural fade goes right. Avoid exposing underside. Use a hyzer angle with a stable-to-overstable disc.

fh.shot_strategy: Viable. Needs to fight the wind. Play a straight or hyzer line.
